description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that can be triggered manually. Run on an ubuntu-latest environment, but only if the workflow is triggered by a specific set of actors (Legorooj, bwoodsend, rokm). The workflow checks out the code, sets up Python 3.9, installs towncrier, twine, and wheel, builds and validates bundles, generates a changelog, uploads to PyPI using a TWINE_TOKEN from secrets, creates a Git tag, bumps the version, and commits changes back into the repository.
